_comment: Synthetic sample posts for backfilling workshop orgs. Text-only, benign, some crafted to trip the seeded scam rules so queues arrive with rule hits. No real users. backfill-items.ts expands each into an ATproto-post submission per org using that org's item-type IDs.

just finished a 10k along the river, absolutely gorgeous morning out there ☀️
anyone have good sourdough starter tips? mine keeps dying after a week
rewatching the entire series before the finale drops this weekend, no spoilers please
the new espresso place downtown is unreal, do yourself a favor and get the cortado
hot take that shouldn't be a hot take: pineapple absolutely belongs on pizza
spent the whole weekend repotting my plants, deeply satisfying and my apartment is a jungle now
trying to learn the bass line for this song and my fingers genuinely hurt, worth it though
the library extended its hours, finally somewhere quiet to actually get work done
made it to the summit! the views were worth every single switchback on the way up
my cat has unilaterally decided 4am is breakfast time and I am powerless to stop her
reading recs? just finished a fantastic sci-fi trilogy and now I have a book-shaped hole in my life
the farmers market had the best heirloom tomatoes today, bought way too many, no regrets
debugging for three hours and of course it was a single missing semicolon 😑
first snow of the season and the whole city suddenly looks like a different place
trying oat milk in my coffee all week as an experiment, the jury is still very much out
the community garden plots finally opened up and I grabbed one, tomatoes incoming
watched the meteor shower last night from the roof, counted at least a dozen, incredible
new bakery on 5th has a matcha croissant that genuinely changed my morning routine
took the kids to the aquarium and the jellyfish tank absolutely stole the show
finally organized my bookshelf by color, it was chaos for a day but worth it
